# terrible_kaytus_ksmanage_edit_smtp_com (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `status` (String) SMTP Support.

### Optional

- `asset_tag` (String) Product asset label.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `email` (String) Sender email.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `event_level` (String) Events above this level will be sent.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `host_name` (String) Server name.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `serial_number` (String) Serial number.
- `server_auth` (String) SMTP server authentication.
- `server_ip` (String) SMTP server IP.
- `server_password` (String) SMTP server Password, length be 4 to 64 bits, cannot contain ' '(space). Required when *server_auth=enable*.
- `server_port` (Number) SMTP server port, The Identification for retry count configuration(1-65535).
- `server_secure_port` (Number) SMTP server secure port, The Identification for retry count configuration(1-65535).
- `server_username` (String) SMTP server Username, length be 4 to 64 bits. Must start with letters and cannot contain ','(comma) ':'(colon) ' '(space) ';'(semicolon) '\\'(backslash). Required when *server_auth=enable*.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `ssl_tls_enable` (String) SMTP SSLTLS Enable. *ssl_tls_enable=disable*, when *star_tls_enable=enable*.
- `star_tls_enable` (String) SMTP STARTTLS Enable. *star_tls_enable=disable*, when *ssl_tls_enable=enable*.
- `subject` (String) Email theme.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `message` (String) Messages returned after module execution.
- `state` (String) Status after module execution.
